overpaid.rationale: Overpayments should not be auto-corrected without deciding whether to refund, credit, or remove duplicates.
Overpayments should not be auto-corrected without deciding whether to refund, credit, or remove duplicates.

duplicateActive.rationale: Multiple active loans require business decision about which loan should remain active.
Multiple active loans require business decision about which loan should remain active.
Multiple active loans require business decision about which loan should remain active.

scheduleTotals.rationale: Schedule totals do not match stored loan totals; automatic repair could corrupt historical repayment plans.

savingsOvercredits.rationale: Existing auto-deposit history predates the fix and should be reviewed before reversing savings entries.
